sniffer_brief.headline: Retail euphoria + smart-money PEP conviction + net liquidity expansion = distribution setup, not breakout.
sniffer_brief.thesis: AAII sentiment at 50% bullish (vs 38% historical) signals retail euphoria — a classic contrarian sell signal. Simultaneously, smart-money clusters show STRONG_CONVICTION on PEP (DURATION + quant funds buying 16% off 52w high), but this is isolated to defensive consumer staples, not broad-market leadership. Net liquidity has expanded $162B (TGA spending), which historically supports beta, but macro

rates_signals_sample.signal: Macro nowcast MUDDLE (normalized score 0) — no economic tailwind, cycle peaking

loudest_anomaly.signal: AAII bullish sentiment at 50% vs 38% historical average
loudest_anomaly.value: 50% bullish (12 percentage points above historical mean)
loudest_anomaly.interpretation: Extreme retail euphoria. Historically a contrarian sell signal — distributions occur when retail is most bullish. High probability of 5-12% drawdown in next 4-8 weeks.

sniffer_brief.most_actionable: SHORT SPY via 3-month put spread (sell 750 / buy 730 puts) on next 2% rally. Ride the retail euphoria distribution + smart-money defensive rotation + bonds desk RISK_OFF. Target: 2-3% premium capture. Stop: SPY closes above 765. Probability 58%, risk-reward 1:2.5.

setup_samples.who: Retail investors (euphoria distribution), smart-money rotation to defensives (PEP), bonds desk (RISK_OFF medium confidence)
setup_samples.catalyst: Macro cycle peak + earnings season disappointment + Fed hawkish hold (no rate cuts priced)

analog.what_happened: Retail euphoria + low VIX + smart money rotating to safety triggered 10% equity drawdown in 2 weeks.

smoking_guns.signal: AAII bullish 50% vs 38% historical — extreme retail euphoria, classic distribution signal
PEP STRONG_CONVICTION (score 81.7) — DURATION + quant funds buying defensives 16% off 52w high, not growth
RISK_OFF regime (medium confidence) — 'sell rallies, not buy dips' on duration cheap at 2.06% real yield
Macro nowcast MUDDLE (normalized score 0) — no economic tailwind, cycle peaking
Total mentions 2,811 below normal — retail disengaged from fundamentals, chasing momentum

setup_samples.ride: SHORT SPY via 3-month put spread: sell 750 puts / buy 730 puts, 1:1 ratio, target 2-3% premium capture. Size: 5-10% of portfolio. Entry: next 2% rally. Stop: SPY closes above 765 (new highs).
setup_samples.fade: If SPY breaks above 765 on volume + VIX stays <15 + earnings beat rate >60%, cover short and flip long. Euphoria can persist 4-6 weeks.
setup_samples.invalidation: Macro nowcast flips to EXPANSION (normalized score >30) OR AAII bullish drops below 40% OR bonds desk flips to RISK_ON.

setup_samples.who: Smart-money legend funds (DURATION) + quant cluster (RENAISSANCE, AQR, TWO_SIGMA, CITADEL, MILLENNIUM)
setup_samples.catalyst: Defensive rotation + dividend yield support (PEP ~2.7% yield) + earnings beat on cost control

analog.what_happened: Smart money rotated to dividend-paying staples; PEP-like names rallied 12-18% as equity vol spiked.
